box_guarantees._source: pokemoncard.co.kr/card/407 product metadata + pokemon-infomation.com Sword/Shield aggregate. Box model: RR 4-5, RRR 2-3, SR/SA/HR/UR 1-2; Pokemon SR 40%, Support SR 30%, SA about 16%, Pokemon HR 10%, Support HR 10%, UR 10%, 2-hit box about 10%. Korean official pull rates are unpublished.
